message.content: Okay, so I need to figure out who the current president of the USA is. Let me think. The user is asking for the current president, so I should make sure the information is up-to-date. I remember that the US has a president who took office in 2021. Before that, there was Donald Trump, but he was the president from 2017 to 2021. Then there was Barack Obama before him, but he left office in 2017. So the current one must be the one who won the 2020 election. I think his name is Joe Biden. Let me confirm that. Joe Biden is a Democrat, right? He was the vice president under
